examples.title: Sum of first N integers (definite loop)
examples.description: Uses a counter-controlled for loop to accumulate a sum from 1 to N.
examples.pseudocode:
set sum to 0
for i from 1 to N inclusive
  add i to sum
print sum

examples.title: Sentinel-controlled average until -1
examples.description: Reads integers until a sentinel value (-1) appears, then prints the average of the entered numbers.
examples.pseudocode:
initialize total to 0 and count to 0
repeat
  read x
  if x is not -1
    add x to total
    increment count
until x is -1
if count > 0 then print total / count else print no data

examples.title: Multiplication table with nested loops
examples.description: Generates an n by n multiplication table using nested loops.
examples.pseudocode:
for row from 1 to n
  for col from 1 to n
    compute product = row * col
    print product with spacing
  end inner
  print newline
